name: HOGE streaming 1024-point NTT wrapper lint
description: Internal forward NTT pipeline wrapper emitted by the HOGE streaming extraction. Passing this task means the required Verilog interface elaborates; it does not prove arithmetic correctness, latency, or output ordering.

parameters.stream_cycles_note: Extraction-side nominal input burst; this lint-only task does not score output burst length.

reference.intended_operation: internal cuHEpp forward twist NTT path over P
reference.original_correctness_boundary: HOGE ExternalProduct final 32-bit torus output compared against TFHEpp::TwistNTT

observable_contract.lint: Verilog must elaborate with module NTTWrap and the listed ports.
observable_contract.ready: io_ready should be high when an input cycle is accepted
observable_contract.not_checked: forward NTT arithmetic, valid burst length, latency, throughput, or coefficient ordering

score.correctness: tier0 interface elaboration only; not an arithmetic correctness result
score.primary: successful lint/elaboration with the required top-level ports
secondary: use hoge_externalproduct_ntt_1024_p64 for executable forward NTT arithmetic and performance comparisons
